response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrable experience with Java/Kotlin, JVM tooling, Spring ecosystem, or enterprise IDE development — their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile apps, with only superficial Java exposure in old roles without context on IDE internals or build tool integration.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across multiple languages and platforms
Active open-source contributor with documented tooling projects
Proven ability to lead and teach via workshops and community talks
concerns: No evidence of enterprise Java/Kotlin or Spring framework development
Absence of IDE internals, JVM tooling, or build system (Maven/Gradle) experience
Java skills listed but never applied in meaningful enterprise tooling contexts
